claim: The prediction in atom ATOM_T013_S024_PRE_03 ("I think in the same way that driving is tricky. and so when I see things like...") is the resolution of the blocker in atom ATOM_T007_S022_BLO_01 ("So that's the big question what is the step two equivalent in the domain of o...").
